offline_build.note: tsc -b typecheck + vite production build of the seeded reference-app's TypeScript; 422 modules transformed, no errors. Confirms the TS seed compiles. The Move package under contracts/ was NOT built or published — that requires the deepbook-sandbox + sui CLI (and the .external-packages/{token,deepbook} source deps), which is out of scope for the offline soundness check.

known_issues: This lesson's arb_executor Move package must be published before the live test: `DEEPBOOK_SANDBOX_DIR=$HOME/workspace/deepbook-sandbox/sandbox bash contracts/scripts/deploy.sh` (writes the chain-specific id into deployment.json). The committed deployment.json carries a placeholder id; re-publish after any sandbox re-genesis.

deploy.sh is first-publish-only: re-running it against the SAME sandbox genesis fails because `sui client test-publish --pubfile-path` already recorded the package. A learner publishes once per genesis (works); re-genesis (pnpm down + deploy-all) regenerates a clean pubfile. Minor re-runnability wart, not learner-path-blocking.

live_gate.command: pnpm vitest run (arb_executor Move package published first via contracts/scripts/deploy.sh)
live_gate.sandbox: local deepbook-sandbox @ origin/main e62fa7d (pnpm deploy-all --quick); DEEP_SUI + SUI_USDC pools
live_gate.result: 2/2 live tests passed reliably across repeated runs (8/8 then 3/3) — borrow→execute_base→repay in one PTB, and short-repay reverts inside arb_executor::execute_base. Flakiness fixed: seedPoolBaseLiquidity now escrows base into vault.base_balance by resting a POST_ONLY DEEP ask (a BalanceManager deposit alone does not feed the vault).

learner_validation.note: Live equivalence gate now passes against a healthy sandbox. The dual-output-mode (learning/explanatory) learner sub-agent pass from lesson-creator Step 7 has not been run yet.
